site.title: PawBench
site.tagline: How (Model × Harness) combinations perform on production-grade tasks
site.description: The same 150 tasks across (Model × Harness) combinations — read each axis independently and separate the model's contribution from the harness's.
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Model × Harness matrix
leaderboard.matrix.title: Model × Harness Score Matrix
leaderboard.matrix.empty: No official results yet — values below are placeholders.
leaderboard.matrix.note: Note: models tagged "text-only" (qwen3.7-max, qwen3.6-max-preview, glm-5.1) don't support multimodal input. Their low scores on multimodal tasks drag down the overall average, so their totals may appear lower than expected.
matrix.title: Model × Harness Score Matrix
matrix.subtitle: Switch by task modality: overall / text / multimodal
matrix.intro: Same submissions, three views split by task modality. "Overall" is the full 150-task set, "Text" restricts to the 124 text-only tasks, "Multimodal" restricts to the 26 image/audio/video tasks.
matrix.tab.multimodal.hint: Only the 26 multimodal tasks (image / audio / video)
matrix.note.multimodal: Text-only models (glm-5.1 / qwen3.6-max-preview / qwen3.7-max) are hidden here — they have no image/audio/video support, so their scores come from harness-supplied text fallbacks and would distort the comparison.
matrix.note.text: With multimodal tasks excluded, gaps better reflect pure text reasoning and code/tool use.
slice.title: Slice Analysis
slice.subtitle: Fine-grained model comparison along task label dimensions; rows are always model × harness
slice.bucket.title: Value
slice.bucket.help: Pick a dimension + 1 value → see model × harness on that subset
slice.noModelData: Submissions don't include slice scores for this dimension yet.
tasks.title: Task Library
tasks.subtitle: All 150 tasks with their prompts, automated checks, and LLM judge rubrics fully visible
tasks.empty: No tasks match the current filters.
blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Project updates and technical posts
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from model to score
howItWorks.step1.title: Pick a model and harness
howItWorks.step1.desc: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint or local model; harness can be QwenPaw / OpenClaw / Hermes
howItWorks.step2.title: Run in Docker
howItWorks.step2.desc: Each task runs in an isolated container with workspace files mounted, strict timeouts and retries
howItWorks.step3.title: Automated + LLM grading
howItWorks.step3.desc: Python grade() functions plus an LLM judge; hybrid tasks zero the LLM share if automated < 0.75
cite.title: Citation
cite.subtitle: If PawBench helps your research, please cite
